recipes.name: Healing Draught
recipes.lore: Mends flesh and quiets pain — the apprentice's first brew.

recipes.name: Emberheart Cologne
recipes.lore: A warm, smoky musk that makes the wearer radiate confidence.

recipes.name: Mourning Veil
recipes.lore: Worn at wakes; lets the grieving glimpse the recently departed.

recipes.name: Gravecaller's Attar
recipes.lore: A necromancer's signature scent — the dead lean closer.

recipes.name: Wyrmscale Perfume
recipes.lore: Reeks of dragonfire; cowards flee, beasts kneel.

recipes.name: Witching Hour
recipes.lore: Five frequencies braided into one midnight bloom.

recipes.name: Silent Bell Eau
recipes.lore: Muffles sound around the wearer; favored by thieves.

recipes.name: Jeweler's Symphony
recipes.lore: All four gemstones distilled — a courtier's flex.

recipes.name: Lotus Reverie
recipes.lore: Dreamy lotus attar that slows time to a drowsy crawl.

recipes.name: Archivist's Cologne
recipes.lore: Ink and old vellum; unlocks forgotten languages.

recipes.name: Falling Star
recipes.lore: Streaked with comet-light; grants a single wish-bright moment.

recipes.name: Assassin's Veil
recipes.lore: Twin daggers of scent — silent, illusory, lethal.

recipes.name: Crystalline Bloom
recipes.lore: Frost-flowers crackle across the skin like quartz.

recipes.name: Purified Ember
recipes.lore: Shadow-trimmed to a single clean flame. (uses a minus pill)

recipes.name: Hollowed Essence
recipes.lore: Demon-liver strips a brew down to one crystalline tone. (two minus pills)

recipes.name: Gilded Trinity
recipes.lore: A tulip's wild spark conjures the missing note. (uses a plus pill)
